_comment: ccBar configuration. Copy to ~/.claude/ccbar.config.json. All fields optional — missing keys fall back to defaults.

segments._comment: Toggle each display segment on or off.

bar._comment: The fill/empty characters can be any UTF-8 glyph or ASCII fallback.

thresholds._comment: Percentages. green up to this value, yellow up to the next, red above yellow.

colors._comment: Valid values: reset bold black red green yellow blue magenta cyan white.

cost._comment: Cost display is an estimate only and does not reflect your billed charge.

git._comment: line_counts: use `git diff --numstat` for staged/unstaged (slower). dirty_marker: string shown when repo is dirty. timeout_ms: per-command git timeout. cache: skip git when .git/HEAD and .git/index haven't changed.

icons._comment: branch: glyph before branch name (empty string = no icon). dirty: overrides dirty_marker when set. staged/unstaged: labels. ascii_fallback: force plain-text icons.
